entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_parse_errors_have_l2')
case_id = 'brackets'
content = '            input a[0]\n            output y\n            y = a\n            '

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("case_id", "content"),
        [
            (
                "bad_syntax",
                """\
                input a b
                output y
                y = AND(a, b
                """,
            ),
            (
                "literal_x",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = X
                """,
            ),
            (
                "brackets",
                """\
                input a[0]
                output y
                y = a
                """,
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_check_parse_errors_have_location(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
        case_id: str,
        content: str,
    ) -> None:
        path = write_circ(tmp_path, f"{case_id}.circ", content)
        result, payload = run_json_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            ["check", str(path), "--json"],
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 2

call.longrepr:
entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_validation_errors_i0')
case_id = 'input_assignment'
content = '            input a\n            output y\n            y = a\n            a = 1\n            '
error_type = 'InputAssignmentError'

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("case_id", "content", "error_type"),
        [
            (
                "declaration_after_assignment",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = a
                wire t1
                t1 = a
                """,
                "DeclarationAfterAssignmentError",
            ),
            (
                "duplicate_name",
                """\
                input a a
                output y
                y = a
                """,
                "DuplicateNameError",
            ),
            (
                "undefined_name",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = z
                """,
                "UndefinedNameError",
            ),
            (
                "input_assignment",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = a
                a = 1
                """,
                "InputAssignmentError",
            ),
            (
                "multiple_assignment",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = a
                y = NOT(a)
                """,
                "MultipleAssignmentError",
            ),
            (
                "unassigned_signal",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                """,
                "UnassignedSignalError",
            ),
            (
                "duplicate_name_across_lines",
                """\
                input a
                input a
                output y
                y = a
                """,
                "DuplicateNameError",
            ),
            (
                "unassigned_wire",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                wire t1
                y = a
                """,
                "UnassignedSignalError",
            ),
            (
                "undeclared_lhs",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                t1 = a
                y = a
                """,
                "UndefinedNameError",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_check_validation_errors(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
        case_id: str,
        content: str,
        error_type: str,
    ) -> None:
        path = write_circ(tmp_path, f"{case_id}.circ", content)
        result, payload = run_json_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            ["check", str(path), "--json"],
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 3
E       assert 0 == 3
E        +  where 0 = CompletedProcess(args=['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py', 'check', '/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_validation_errors_i0/input_assignment.circ', '--json'], returncode=0, stdout='{"ok": true, "command": "check", "format": "circ", "inputs": [{"name": "a", "msb": 0, "lsb": 0}], "outputs": [{"name": "y", "msb": 0, "lsb": 0}]}\n', stderr='').returncode
